identity.description: Small reptilian dungeon-dwellers that favour traps, ambushes, and pack tactics.

combat.defenseSummary: AC 14; HP 5 (2d6-2); Small target with AC Bonus and standard small-size drawbacks.
combat.offenseSummary: Dagger +6 for 1d4+2 piercing; Sling +6 for 1d4+2 bludgeoning at Range 2 (30 ft). Pack Tactics grants attack Edge when allies are nearby.

system.statBlock:
Source: Anime 5E Fifth Edition Core Rules, p. 216.

Attributes: AC Bonus 2; Combat Mastery 2; Edge 2 (Pack Tactics); Features 1 (Darkvision 60 ft); Language 1 (Common, Draconic); Unique Attribute 1 (Small, light, and unobtrusive); Weapon Proficiency 1 (Shortsword).

Defects: Limited Damage 2; Obstacle 2 (Sunlight Sensitivity); Obstacle 4 (Strength dice rolls); Slow 1; Susceptible 2; Unique Defect 1 (Thrown weapon distance divided by 2).

Points: -2 Attribute/Defect subtotal + 10 Base + 54 Abilities = 62.

notes.overview: Winged kobolds are a sturdier subrace with increased Strength and Constitution, plus Flight Rank 1.

identity.description: Small goblinoid raiders with Nimble Escape, light armour, and ranged or melee ambush options.

combat.defenseSummary: AC 17; HP 7 (2d6); light armour and shield with small-size defensive modifiers.
combat.offenseSummary: Scimitar +6 for 1d6+2 slashing; Shortbow +6 for 1d6+2 piercing at Range 3 (100 ft). Nimble Escape grants limited bonus action mobility.

system.statBlock:
Source: Anime 5E Fifth Edition Core Rules, p. 217.

Attributes: AC Bonus 2; Armour Proficiency 2 (Light armour, shields); Combat Mastery 2; Extra Actions - Lesser 2 (Nimble Escape: Disengage, Hide); Features 1 (Darkvision 60 ft); Language 1 (Common, Goblin); Unique Attribute 1 (Small, light, and unobtrusive); Weapon Proficiency 1 (Scimitar).

Defects: Limited Damage 2; Obstacle 4 (Strength dice rolls); Slow 1; Susceptible 2; Unique Defect 1 (Thrown weapon distance divided by 2).

Points: 2 Attribute/Defect subtotal + 10 Base + 60 Abilities = 72.

notes.overview: Swamp goblins have increased Wisdom and Water Speed Rank 1.

identity.description: Medium humanoid raiders with strong melee pressure, darkvision, and intimidation training.

combat.defenseSummary: AC 13; HP 15 (2d8+6); medium humanoid with hide armour.
combat.offenseSummary: Greataxe +5 for 1d12+3 slashing; Javelin +3 for 1d6+1 piercing at Range 2 (30 ft). Aggressive movement is represented as Extra Actions - Lesser.

system.statBlock:
Source: Anime 5E Fifth Edition Core Rules, p. 218.

Attributes: Armour Proficiency 2 (Light and medium armour); Extra Actions - Lesser 1 (Aggressive: move towards seen enemy); Features 1 (Darkvision 60 ft); Language 1 (Common, Orc); Skill Proficiency 1 (Intimidation); Weapon Proficiency 1 (Greataxe).

Points: 7 Attribute/Defect subtotal + 13 Base + 72 Abilities = 92.

notes.overview: Orog are powered-up orcs with increased Strength, Constitution, Intelligence, and Charisma, plus enhanced combat talents.

identity.description: Large giant-blooded brute with powerful Strength, low accuracy, and heavy thrown-weapon limitations.
identity.homelandHabitat: Caves and abandoned ruins or farmholds

combat.defenseSummary: AC 9; HP 59 (7d10+21); Large body with Protected 2 and AC Penalty 2.
combat.offenseSummary: Large one-handed greatclub +4 for 2d8+6 bludgeoning; Large javelin -1 for 2d6+1 piercing at Range 2 (30 ft).

system.statBlock:
Source: Anime 5E Fifth Edition Core Rules, p. 220.

Attributes: Armour Proficiency 2 (Light and medium armour); Edge 4 (Strength dice rolls); Fast 1; Features 1 (Darkvision 60 ft); Language 1 (Common, Giant); Massive Damage 2; Protected 2; Unique Attribute 1 (x2 Thrown weapon distance).

Defects: AC Penalty 2; Blind Fury 1 (Extreme injury or taunting); Inept Attack 2; Unique Defect 1 (Big, heavy, and obvious).

Points: 11 Attribute/Defect subtotal + 39 Base + 62 Abilities = 112.

notes.overview: Sun ogres are thinner desert or tropical variants with higher Dexterity and average Intelligence.

identity.description: Large giant-kin with fast regeneration, bite and claw attacks, and a weakness window after acid or fire damage.

combat.defenseSummary: AC 13; HP 84 (8d10+40); Protected 2; Regeneration 8 restores 10 HP/round except for one round after acid or fire damage.
combat.offenseSummary: Bite +5 for 1d6+6 piercing; Claw +5 for 2d4+6 slashing. Extra Actions 2 grants two bonus actions per round.

system.statBlock:
Source: Anime 5E Fifth Edition Core Rules, p. 223.

Attributes: AC Bonus 2; Edge 4 (Strength dice rolls); Extra Actions 2; Fast 1; Features 1 (Darkvision 60 ft); Heightened Senses 1 (Keen Smell); Language (Giant); Massive Damage 2; Protected 2; Regeneration 8 (10 HP/round with acid/fire limiter); Skill Proficiency 1 (Perception); Unique Attribute 1 (x2 Thrown weapon distance); Weapon 2 (Bite); Weapon 2 (Claw).

Defects: Inept Attack 2; Unique Defect 1 (Big, heavy, and obvious).

Points: 36 Attribute/Defect subtotal + 46 Base + 74 Abilities = 156.

notes.overview: Snow trolls have reduced Regeneration Rank 4 that is not affected by acid and fire, and full Immunity to cold Rank 3.
